Four ambulances set on fire in London in suspected antisemitic hate crimePolice said they were looking for three suspects after the London Fire Brigade were called to Golders Green at around 01:40 GMT. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyj1p49gdpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwyj1p49gdpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 05:17:00 GMT
UN issues new climate warning as El Niño loomsThe Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c203rdxkezwo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 04:06:22 GMT
Three golds in 28 minutes - GB makes history at World Athletics Indoor ChampionshipsGreat Britain claim three golds in a sensational 28 minutes to make history and achieve the team's best-ever haul at the World Athletics Indoor Championships. https://www.bbc.com/sport/athletics/articles/c20qjlyezjvo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/athletics/articles/c20qjlyezjvo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 20:59:23 GMT
Grisly or just country life? The mole photos dividing social mediaA hill walker shares a snap of moles hanging on barbed wire and is surprised by the huge response. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm28jj22kg3o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:05:18 GMT
France's Socialists hold onto power in major cities in election boost for mainstreamParis and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crk14m7mjddo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crk14m7mjddo#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 23:27:59 GMT
Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and propertiesThe violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew719w80g7o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 22:38:24 GMT
Prince William keen to build 'strong and meaningful' bond with ChurchAn aide to the prince says his commitment to the Church of England is "sometimes quieter" than expected. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx230em8jg7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx230em8jg7o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 20:59:37 GMT
Potential sites for Labour's 'new towns' cut to sevenSix sites have been deprioritised from the flagship scheme to build a wave of new settlements. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c393l8w7me2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c393l8w7me2o#0 Sun, 22 Mar 2026 22:58:06 GMT
Heat pumps work for me - but they're not yet a money saverThe government wants Britons to embrace heat pumps. But will they ever make financial sense for the average user? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ce358gkx9vpo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:04:45 GMT
Plan to scrap most short jail terms comes into effectThe government hopes it will ease the population crisis in prisons.https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxk6dqqp1qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxk6dqqp1qo#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 00:05:03 GMT
Scotland begins testing newborn babies for rare genetic conditionSpinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) causes progressive muscle weakness and, without treatment, can limit life expectancy to just two years. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx26glrw310o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx26glrw310o#0 Mon, 23 Mar 2026 02:55:52 GMT
